summary: Full backend + frontend smoke test for THE MOMENT CLUB. Backend: 24/24 pytest passed covering auth, RBAC, events/notifications/announcements CRUD, event registration, member approval, proposals, public stats. Frontend: landing page (hero, marquee, stats), login (role tabs + Google btn), core dashboard, member registration + pending banner + event register — all working. Core admin login with seeded creds works.

issues: Outlined 'IS NOW.' sub-text has low contrast on dark background (intentional design, but worth noting)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py mixes JWT cookie and Google session token both under 'access_token' cookie name — acceptable but slightly confusing; consider distinct cookie names.

CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True — browsers ignore credentialed requests with wildcard origins; in production replace '*' with explicit origins list (currently works because the frontend origin is same domain via Kubernetes ingress).
Resend email sends happen as fire-and-forget asyncio.create_task without failure tracking — ok for MVP.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook recommends lockout after 5 fails) — not implemented; add if auth hardening is required.
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection. Good.
test_credentials: core@themomentclub.in / admin123 (seeded core_team); dynamic TEST_ users created during tests
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed events, notifications, proposals and clean them up. Faculty & member test accounts with random suffix remain in DB (non-destructive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py using unique per-run email suffixes so re-runs don't collide. Faculty dashboard and announcement-delete UI flows not exercised end-to-end — only tested via API. Google OAuth redirect chain intentionally skipped per review_request. If retesting, seeded admin password may have been rotated by seed_admin logic; re-seed happens on backend restart.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — all flows pass.
